description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the php:5.6 Docker image with a mysql:latest service and defines HEROKU_API_KEY, MYSQL_DATABASE, and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD variables. Add a global before_script that runs bash gitlabci/before_script.sh > /dev/null, bash gitlabci/install_dependency.sh > /dev/null, and bash gitlabci/setup_database.sh. Define two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a code_coverage job that runs bash gitlabci/install_phpunit.sh > /dev/null, bash gitlabci/install_xdebug.sh > /dev/null, vendor/bin/phpunit --coverage-text --colors=never --configuration phpunit.xml, mkdir test/, cp -r /tmp/report test/, and stores the test/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that moves public to public_old, creates a new public directory, moves test/ into public/, publishes public/ as a pages artifact and depends on code_coverage, and a staging job that runs only on the develop branch, runs bash gitlabci/install_ruby.sh, gem install dpl, and dpl --provider=heroku --app=jojotravel --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY to deploy to Heroku.
